posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team!

I’m a big fan of the monday.com Forms; they’ve received some excellent updates over the past few years!

However, the forms currently do not meet my more advanced needs, specifically:

  1. Pre-filling via URL for all column types, including columns that support multiple dropdown selections.

  2. Setting individual response limits (for creating scheduling forms with limited slots/availability).

For now, I’ve had to develop custom solutions to handle these requirements, but I would love to switch back to using monday Forms in the future if these features are implemented.

Keep up the great work, and I hope you have a fantastic webinar!
